name: The crow you saved
description:
–｡✧｡–

„A moments peace.“

–｡✧｡–

You help a little injured crow without knowing it's actually him. Made it like he sneaks away during his free time to stay with you. Hopefully it works. Anotherpov about this coming soon.

Backstory is in his personality. I'm not that creative to think imagine what happened.
creator: ikapars
